message:
test(luahelper,surface,term): expand vendored crate test suites

luahelper/tests.rs (+330 lines):
- Add FromDynamic/ToDynamic derive-based test structs (DemoStruct,
  DemoArgs, DemoAction enum) exercising impl_lua_conversion_dynamic!
- Tests for from_lua edge cases: nil → None, boolean → DynValue::Bool,
  integer/float coercion, table → Object/Array, nested tables,
  userdata with/without __tostring metamethod
- Tests for dynamic_to_lua_value round-trips: String, I64, F64, Bool,
  Null, Array, nested Object, empty Object/Array
- Error path tests: invalid type conversions, recursive table depth
- Import cleanup: add FromDynamic/ToDynamic to use declaration,
  reformat multi-type object insertion

surface/cellcluster.rs (+1 line):
- Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests placeholder for future test expansion

surface/change.rs (+1 line):
- Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests placeholder

surface/hyperlink.rs (+1 line):
- Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests placeholder

surface/line/line.rs (+588 lines):
- Major test expansion: Line appending/truncation, zone range mutation,
  cell attribute comparison, line equality with different sequences,
  semantic zone management, DoubleClickRange edge cases, Line::from_text
  with non-ASCII/emoji, line clipping boundaries, dirty flag tracking,
  and line serialization round-trip tests

term/screen.rs (+33/-1):
- Adjust reflow batch coverage check for empty-range edge case
- Minor test refinements for viewport reflow plan validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
